summary: Comprehensive testing of country statistics pages feature. All 4 tested country pages (UK, Germany, Thailand, Australia) load correctly with proper URL structure /{country-slug}-addiction-rehabs. Footer has Browse by Country section with 20 countries grouped by region (Europe, Americas, Asia Pacific & Africa) with emoji flags. All features working as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Country pages feature fully tested. All 20 countries configured in countryConfig.ts. URL pattern: /{country-slug}-addiction-rehabs. Footer has Browse by Country and Browse by US State sections. Year selector works (2019-2025). Treatment centers section shows verified facilities. Data source citations displayed.

uk_country_page.details: Page loads with UK flag, Europe region, year selector, key statistics, historical charts, treatment centers, additional stats

germany_country_page.details: Page loads with Germany flag, Europe region, data source citation (DBDD Germany 2024)

thailand_country_page.details: Page loads with Thailand flag, Asia region, data source citation (ONCB Thailand 2024)

australia_country_page.details: Page loads with Australia flag, Oceania region, data source citation (AIHW Australia 2024)

year_selector.details: Dropdown shows years 2019-2025, selection updates Key Statistics section

historical_charts.details: Line chart (People Affected Over Time) and Bar chart (Drug vs Alcohol Related Deaths) displayed

data_source_citation.details: Source citation with View Source link displayed below Key Statistics

treatment_centers_section.details: Shows verified treatment centers with ratings, reviews, treatment types, View All link

footer_browse_by_country.details: 20 countries grouped by region (Europe, Americas, Asia Pacific & Africa) with emoji flags

footer_browse_by_us_state.details: Top 10 US states by population with View All 51 States link

footer_country_link_navigation.details: Clicking country link in footer navigates to correct country page
